title: WTW Announces Upcoming Conference Presentation
text: ARLINGTON, Va. and LONDON, Feb. 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (Willis Towers Watson, NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, announced today that it will participate in the BofA Securities 2022 Insurance Conference running from Tuesday, February 15th – Wednesday, February 16th. The event is virtual.

title: Willis Towers Watson PLC (WTW) CEO Carl Hess on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Willis Towers Watson PLC (WTW) CEO Carl Hess on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.98% and 3.35%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Will Willis Towers (WTW) Retain Its Beat Streak in Q4 Earnings?
text: Willis Towers (WLTW) fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect the impact of growth in Medicare Advantage and Life sales, strong renewals and new business activity.

title: Why Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
